TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_sadu, title = sadu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/sadu} }

S.FORM: alang sadu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 366 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 348 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 82%, Tayan 10%, Bunun 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na sadu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na sadu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na sadu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na sadu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na sadu hya' ga busi. tay 'zil na sadu hya' ga truwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang sadu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 366 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 348 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 82%, Tayan 10%, Bunun 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na sadu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na sadu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na sadu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na sadu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na sadu hya' ga busi. tay 'zil na sadu hya' ga truwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*u ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa βus~ɕi. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*u ħjaʔ ɣa truwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
